items.claim: Max Holloway's training footage is superior to Conor McGregor's.
items.quote: I like what I'm seeing from the training footage from Max more so than from Connor.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a limited window of five to seven minutes to secure a knockout.
items.quote: I think Conor's got five to seven minutes to get the knockout.
one of the guys has cardio issues, and that's that's how I feel in this fight.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's physical condition has declined due to his lifestyle outside the cage.
items.quote: the way that he's been treating his body outside of the cage over the years, it's all going to show itself on Saturday.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett is a cleaner striker than Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: I think Patty's going to be a little bit cleaner on the feet

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has more power than Patty Pimblett.
items.quote: I feel like BSD is probably going to have the power.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett has superior jiu-jitsu compared to Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: I do think Patty has better jiu-jitsu

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has better control grappling than Patty Pimblett.
items.quote: I think BSD has better has better control grappling.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a history of cardio issues.
items.quote: he's someone who has just had cardio issues in the past.

items.claim: Kong Wang is a clinical striker.
items.quote: Kong Wang is a very, very clinical striker

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will struggle with the size difference at light heavyweight.
items.quote: He's going to have a little bit of issues with the size
